outcome: Three polish fixes to the Notes (Notion-style) section, each shipped and verified: (1) better programming-language detection for code blocks when typing or pasting code (sensible default, fenced-paste language detection, and auto-guess the language from pasted code content); (2) the page '···' options popup is no longer clipped/hidden by the left sidebar — it renders fully visible above all chrome; (3) the page templates are redesigned to genuinely resemble Notion's template gallery (categories + richer, well-structured multi-block templates), informed by https://www.notion.com/templates .
constraints: pnpm lint (0 errors), pnpm test, and pnpm build must all pass at the end of every iteration — never leave the app red.

Do not regress the shipped Notes features (nestable pages, autosave, slash menu incl. callout/divider/columns/toc/bookmark/equation, sub-pages, mentions, favorites, quick switcher, cover/emoji, full-width toggle, code-block highlighting).
Do not push to production or merge to main during the loop — branch-only. Production deploy happens only on explicit user approval.
Do not touch unrelated app sections except shared layout/nav touchpoints needed for the Notes popup fix.
Keep BlockNote as the editor foundation; extend via config/custom blocks/slash items, don't replace it.
boundaries: Work on branch feat/notes-polish-2 with frequent commits.

In scope: src/components/notes/**, src/app/(app)/notes/**, src/app/api/notes/**, src/lib/notes/**, src/lib/models/notes-page.ts, notes-related entries in src/lib/validations.ts, and notes layout/nav touchpoints in src/components/layout/** + content-shell.
May add npm deps (pnpm) when needed (e.g. a lightweight language detector).
May use WebFetch/WebSearch to study Notion's template gallery + categories.
iteration_policy: Each round: pick the next of the three deliverables by impact (start with the '···' popup visibility bug since it makes the menu unusable; then code-block language detection; then the templates redesign, which is the largest). Implement natively (TDD for pure logic such as a language-detection helper or template generators), keep the app green, commit, and append a one-line log entry. The templates task may span several iterations (research Notion categories, redesign the gallery UX, then author richer templates).
blocked_condition: Report and pause if a fix needs infrastructure/secrets not available, an irreversible/outward-facing action (deploy), or a product decision only the user can make (e.g. exactly which Notion template categories/templates to include).
